subject: Re: how
body:
I just re-read your e-mail... I hope it is your
period speaking....the apts have been started before
ghislaine left.. the furniture was supposed to have
already been chosen  as the delivery date of the
furiniture sets the whole schedule for paint carpet.
etc... when I heard it hadn't yet been done,, I gave a
time limit  so as to limit confusion as to what comes
first...   I forgot   that out of all the people in
the home show , you are obviously the only one who has
a boyfriend, as I'm sure it must have been a very
unpleasnt day in 
NEw York that for every women who went to the show...
they were unable to do anything else for the whole
day//and maybe the whole week....    I don't think the
word nag is appropriate,unless you think I need to be
reminded , that I have attempted to communicate to you
my prioirties more than one time..I'd still very much
appreciate you  clearly telling me   just what it is
you will do..  if  i accidently ask you to do somehing
that you haven't agreed to...please point it oout
immediately.  no projects, errands, repsonsibility  
except..... marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com> wrote:

>   I don’t know what to say. One day you say
> apartments are not important to you and next day you
> tell me I have just a few days to pick all of the
> furniture. I needed to spend almost all my time
> doing that if I wanted to get it done. Plus I had to
> be there when the painter had to see the apartments,
> some furniture got delivered, carpets were
> measured.. Then you asked me to go to the home show.
> And it is incredibly frustrating when knowing that
> you gave me enough to do to keep me busy full time
> you then call and nag about girls again. What did
> you expect me to do? If you didn’t want me to do 301
> , why would you ask ? Still, I did go out on Friday
> . I was doing my best, talking to some Brazilian
> girls; it just didn’t work out. And when the people
> started talking about going to take some drugs, I
> left. And don’t plan on going out with them again.
> If Nathalie doesn’t mind - good for her. But I don’t
> want to spend any time in this environment .
>   I did ask you to be realistic, because what you
> seem to expect is really not. Nobody could do it.
> First, you want me to do Nathalie’s job ( I remember
> you said she does something else now, this is what I
> know what it used to be ) In order to do that , she
> stays in NY , she spends most of her time meeting
> with the girls during the day or going out at night.
> You also want me to do what your assistants do -
> another full time job. Then, cook, 
>   do massage, stretching, find good looking people
> for massages & other treatments, work out every day,
> run any errands you might have for me and still
> manage to come up with new sex stuff .  How ?
> 
> 			
> ---------------------------------
>  Yahoo! Mail
>  Use Photomail to share photos without annoying
attachments.

body_html:
I just re-read your e-mail... I hope it is your
period speaking....the apts have been started before
ghislaine left.. the furniture was supposed to have
already been chosen as the delivery date of the
furiniture sets the whole schedule for paint carpet.
etc... when I heard it hadn't yet been done,, I gave a
time limit so as to limit confusion as to what comes
first... I forgot that out of all the people in
the home show , you are obviously the only one who has
a boyfriend, as I'm sure it must have been a very
unpleasnt day in
NEw York that for every women who went to the show...
they were unable to do anything else for the whole
day//and maybe the whole week.... I don't think the
word nag is appropriate,unless you think I need to be
reminded , that I have attempted to communicate to you
my prioirties more than one time..I'd still very much
appreciate you clearly telling me just what it is
you will do.. if i accidently ask you to do somehing
that you haven't agreed to...please point it oout
immediately. no projects, errands, repsonsibility
except..... marcinkova nadja2102@yahoo.com wrote:

I don’t know what to say. One day you say
apartments are not important to you and next day you
tell me I have just a few days to pick all of the
furniture. I needed to spend almost all my time
doing that if I wanted to get it done. Plus I had to
be there when the painter had to see the apartments,
some furniture got delivered, carpets were
measured.. Then you asked me to go to the home show.
And it is incredibly frustrating when knowing that
you gave me enough to do to keep me busy full time
you then call and nag about girls again. What did
you expect me to do? If you didn’t want me to do 301
, why would you ask ? Still, I did go out on Friday
. I was doing my best, talking to some Brazilian
girls; it just didn’t work out. And when the people
started talking about going to take some drugs, I
left. And don’t plan on going out with them again.
If Nathalie doesn’t mind - good for her. But I don’t
want to spend any time in this environment .
I did ask you to be realistic, because what you
seem to expect is really not. Nobody could do it.
First, you want me to do Nathalie’s job ( I remember
you said she does something else now, this is what I
know what it used to be ) In order to do that , she
stays in NY , she spends most of her time meeting
with the girls during the day or going out at night.
You also want me to do what your assistants do -
another full time job. Then, cook,
do massage, stretching, find good looking people
for massages & other treatments, work out every day,
run any errands you might have for me and still
manage to come up with new sex stuff . How ?

Yahoo! Mail
Use Photomail to share photos without annoying
attachments.

subject: Re: how
body:
o.k... it seems I have not been clear.... i'm sorry...
there is nothing  absolutely nothign more important to
me than you and I having fun...  I do not care about
the apartments.... the home show... or anything
else///giving you that project was a mistake..  it
won't happen again... your only project is to be a
girlfriend to me..      no errands.. no projects...
Fun    with you is the only thing,, this includes you
staying in good physical shape.. WE should agree on
what you think you would like to do. can do resonably
, and will do.. It would be more helpful if you tell
me what you are going to commit to doing... as opossed
to what you cn't do... WE need to have a clear
agreement , on both sides to prevent unitended
consequences..
